prediction.reasoning: Based on AAPL's historical volatility of approximately 25-30% annualized, which translates to roughly 1.5-2% daily moves. The 7-day prediction assumes normal market conditions with no major catalysts. Point estimate reflects slight upward bias typical of large-cap tech stocks over weekly horizons. Confidence intervals calculated using log-normal distribution with estimated weekly volatility of ~4.5%.
